title: PaciCraft
description: PaciCraft, a regression + mod, this is a companion mod for NappyCraft what helps with regression, adds much more like woods and foods.
body:
![No Longer Supported](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f31723286cb21a78f138f6c5d85b1e79a3d572a.png)

 ![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/508025c7d951294bae979e6ad99957ea20a66ff3.png)


### **_This mod as been moved back to it's ownership, please note we still love this mod it was just time to let this mod go back to it's original creator, You can find the updated version [Pacicraft: Lil' Crafters](https://modrinth.com/mod/pacicraft-lil-crafters)._**


![What's this mod add:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07e900348c8a5fa8f4b1cde9724fae569ca4de11.png)
✅ Features:

- 🦺  Armor: Pacifiers/Dummies/Binkies/Soothers. +2 Armor (⚔️ Survival)
- 🍼    Food: Bottle & Sippy Cup of Orange .+5 Food points(10 hunger points), +40 Saturation (⚔️ Survival)
- 🌲  Biome: Orange Orchard, new tree, leaves and drops, this is how you get the oranges. (⚔️ Survival)
- 📚   Items: The above items and loads of new wood items like buttons, slabs, stairs, doors (⚔️ Survival)
 


![What's this mod for:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d84c6cdae245fcee15e12062281eb87a7503874b.png)

📖 This mod is for anyone whom would like to role play being a 👶baby/🧒child again, you create your own 🌎 worlds in Minecraft and with this mod
your one step closer, our mod was born because of another regression mod what didn't have all the items you might of wanted/needed to role play
so I have created them here with that mods authors blessing, I hope you enjoy it.
 


![How to get the items:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71957d7a834e7d9e558442ff179ca4987981d1de.png)

❓ It seems a few users are brand new to Minecraft modding and to you guys I welcome you and they
keep asking about recipes, well as most mod users and mod creators rely on tools now like [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/roughly-enough-items)
to show the user the recipes from any given mod

I advice you to use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), reason I say this is this is the one I have tested with our mod, when you press
E or at the Crafting Table with [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) installed you will get a large list of items, in the box at the bottom
right type @PaciCraft to find all the PaciCraft recipes.

🌐 Download [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), enjoy, if your viewing this in the [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) app you will see [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) on the first page of
the mods page if you don't just type [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) in the search at the top.
 

 

![Mods Needed:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27c00b770f17984ace63c8cf0507ba10e8b33f4a.png)

- NappyCraft 1.0.8.0 or higher [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/nappycraft)
 

 

![Forge/Backports:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83c51c3ccb669b54ab4a29d556de69d648fa849e.png)

- 📖 We have no plans to backport any of our mods, also Forge might be a more bulky mod loader but there
is good reason for this, it's feature set is much larger and Fabric isn't able to compete with this, also Fabric
also hasn't hold up to it's ideals from the start what they promised us so yes in some cases Fabric is faster
then some mods compared to Forge, but this is because right now Fabric does not have the over head
Forge has, also Forge is much easier to stack other Forge mods on top, The way Fabric is created is a mod
takes used of one part of the loader it can lock other mods out creating problems or even crash's the mod
creator isn't at fault, this is how Fabric is designed they just don't stack.

- 📖 We advise you to use Forge but this is because yes big mod packs are a pain in Forge but you can swop
and change and debug much better Fabric has a future but our team does not like Fabrics false promise's and
how they not try act there better then Forge, Forge is floored we know this but they tried and not act like there
better then other mod loaders.  
 

### Supporting The Mods?
This will be updated and will point you to original creator and now future creator.

Most importantly **ENJOY** yourself.

![No Longer Supported](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f31723286cb21a78f138f6c5d85b1e79a3d572a.png)
